LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: GRANT. THE NG DEFENDANTS AND THE LEE DEFENDANTS SHALL EACH PAY $6,099 IN ATTORNEYS' FEES TO THE PLAINTIFFS NO LATER THAN JULY 31, 2009. BOTH INJUNCTIONS ARE EXTENDED FOR ANOTHER NINE MONTHS. PENALTIES OF $25,000 AGAINST THE NG DEFENDANTS AND THE LEE DEFENDANTS ARE STAYED ON THE CONDITION THAT THE DEFENDANTS HAVE PERFORMED ALL OF THEIR OBLIGATIONS UNDER THE INJUNCTIONS ON OR BEFORE MARCH 18, 2010. IF THE DEFENDANTS ARE NOT IN COMPLIANCE WITH THEIR OBLIGATIONS UNDER THE INJUNCTIONS ON OR BEFORE MARCH 18, 2010 THE PENALTIES OF $25,000 WILL BE IMPOSED AND THE PLAINTIFF MAY SEEK ADDITIONAL PENALTIES FOR THE TIME PERIOD BEGINNING JUNE 18, 2009. ORDER RE: CONTEMPT AGAINST DEFENDANTS HAWK N. LEE AND SANDRA M. J. LEE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. ORDER RE: CONTEMPT AGAINST DEFENDANTS CANDACE CHAN NG AND KAM NG SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-18-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE INJUCTION WILL BE CONTINUED FOR 6 MONTHS FROM TODAY. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY'S FEES OF $7,704 WILL BE PAID ACCORDINGLY: TWO-THIRDS BY DEFENDANTS NG AND ONE-THIRD BY DEFENDANTS LEE, PAID 60 DAYS FROM TODAY. Osc Re: Contempt
Off Calendar Oct-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michael Weiss, Esq. Deputy City Attorney (415-554-3824), appearing for plaintiff / moving party City & County of San Francisco
Jody C. Weiner, Esq. of JODY C. WEINER & ASSOCIATES (415-921-2042), appearing for defendants / opposing parties Hawk N. Lee and Sandra M.J. Lee, defendants also present
No appearance for defendants Candice Chang Ng and Kam Ng, defendants not present.

RULING:
Plaintiffs City and County of San Francisco and People of the State of California's Order to Show Cause Re Contempt as to Defendants for failure to comply with the stipulated injunctions.
No argument was made and defendants Hawk N. Lee and Sandra M.J. Lee were found in contempt for failing to comply with the 2006 stipulated Injunction, no opposition filed. Defendants were ordered to pay half of the attorney's fees in the amount of $2,782. Payment due on November 30, 2010. The injunction, in its entirety, was ordered reinstated and extended until further order of the Court. Order signed in open court.
No argument was made and the defendants Chang Ng and Kam Ng were found in contempt for failing to comply with the 2005 stipulated Injunction, no opposition filed. Defendants were ordered to pay half of the attorney's fees in the amount of $2,782. Pursuant to the terms of the 2005 Injunction, a penalty in the amount of $50,000 be imposed against the Ng Defendants. Both payment due on November 30, 2010. The injunction, in its entirety, was ordered reinstated and extended until further order of the Court. Order signed in open court.
Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Continued To Dec-14-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Plaintiffs City And County Of San Francisco And People Of The State Of California'S Order To Show Cause Re Contempt As To Defendants Kam Ng And Candace Ng (Per Ex Parte Order Of 02/23/10)
Off Calendar Mar-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jennifer E. Choi, Esq. Deputy City Attorney (415-554-3887), appearing for plaintiff / moving party CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

Jody C. Weiner, Esq. of JODY C. WEINER & ASSOCIATES (415-921-2042), appearing for defendant / opposing party HAWK N. LEE, SANDRA M.J. LEE

John Huster, Esq. of THE HUSTER LAW GROUP (415-398-9700), appearing for defendant / opposing party CANDACE CHANG NG, KAM NG


RULING:
Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco and People of the State of California's Order to Show Cause Re Contempt as to Defendants for failure to comply with injunction. The injuction will be continued for 6 months from today. Plaintiff's attorney's fees of $7,704 will be paid accordingly: two-thirds by Defendants Ng and one-third by Defendants Lee, paid 60 days from today. Civil penalty is increased to $50,000, stay pending determination of full compliance. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976=(220/HEK)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Continued To Jul-13-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Plaintiffs City And County Of San Francisco And People Of The State Of California'S Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt
Off Calendar Jun-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT.
APPEARANCES: Jennifer E. Choi, Deputy City Atty 554-3887 for pltfs & moving parties; Jody C. Weiner, Esq. of Jody C. Weiner & Associates 921-2042 for defts & opposing parties Hawk N. Lee & Sandra M. J. Lee; John Huster, Esq. of The Huster Law Group 398-9700 for defts & opposing parties Candace Ng & Kam Ng.
RULING: The Court modified its tentative ruling and adopted as follows: GRANT. The Ng defendants and the Lee defendants shall each pay $6,099 in attorneys' fees to the plaintiffs no later than July 31, 2009. Both injunctions are extended for another nine months. Penalties of $25,000 against the Ng defendants and the Lee defendants are stayed on the condition that the defendants have performed all of their obligations under the injunctions on or before March 18, 2010. If the defendants are not in compliance with their obligations under the injunctions on or before March 18, 2010 the penalties of $25,000 will be imposed and the plaintiff may seek additional penalties for the time period beginning June 18, 2009. Order re: contempt against defendants Hawk N. Lee and Sandra M. J. Lee signed in open court. Order re: contempt against defendants Candace Chan Ng and Kam Ng signed in open court. (302/HEK/HEK) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
